The '''58th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held between 29 August to 8 September 2001.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.americancinemapapers.com/files/Orig_GOLDEN_LIONS_2001.htm|title=GOLDEN LIONS – VENICE - 2001|access-date=6 October 2013}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=503&lang=en|title=The 2000s|date=19 April 2010 |access-date=8 October 2013}}</ref>

The opening night film was ''[[Dust (2001 film)|Dust]]'' by [[Milcho Manchevski]]. Italian filmmaker [[Nanni Moretti]] was the Jury President of the main competition. [[Mira Nair]]'s '''''[[Monsoon Wedding]]''''' was the [[Golden Lion]] winner.

==Jury==
The following people comprised the 2001 jury:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|title=Juries for the 2000s|access-date=3 April 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170804133752/http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|archive-date=4 August 2017|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=58. Mostra Internazionale d’Arte Cinematografica |url=https://asac.labiennale.org/attivita/cinema/annali?anno=2001 |website=labiennale.org |access-date=14 June 2025}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Nanni Moretti]], Italian director and actor - Jury President
* [[Jeanne Balibar]], French actress and singer
* [[Amitav Ghosh]], Indian author
* [[Taylor Hackford]], American director
* [[Cecilia Roth]], Argentine actress
* [[Jerzy Skolimowski]], Polish director and actor
* [[Vibeke Windeløv]], Danish producer

===Luigi De Laurentiis Award for a Debut Feature===
* [[Francesco Casetti]], Italian film theorist
* [[Cédric Kahn]], French  director
* [[Jafar Panahi]],  Iranian director
* [[Jean-Loup Passek]], French film critic
* Ruth Vitale, American producer

===Cinema of the Present (Cinema del presente)===
* [[Michel Ciment]], French film critic
* Piera Detassis, Italian  film critic
* [[Shigehiko Hasumi]], Japanese film critic
* [[Emanuel Levy]], American film critic
* [[Gavin Smith (film studio executive)|Gavin Smith]], American film studio executive

=== Short Films Competition ===
* [[Francesca Comencini]], Italian director
* Jacques Kermabon, French film critic
* Mario Micaelo, Portuguese founder of the Vila do Conde International Short Film Festival

==Official Section==
The following films were selected to be screened:<ref>{{cite news |title=Tutti i film di Venezia 2001 |url=https://mam-e.it/tutti-i-film-di-venezia-2001/ |access-date=9 March 2024 |work=MAM-e |date=27 July 2001 |language=it-IT}}</ref>

==Official Awards==

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Golden Lion]]: ''[[Monsoon Wedding]]'' by [[Mira Nair]]
*[[Grand Jury Prize (Venice Film Festival)|Grand Special Jury Prize]]: ''[[Dog Days (2001 film)|Dog Days]]'' by [[Ulrich Seidl]]
*[[Silver Lion]]: ''[[Secret Ballot (film)|Secret Ballot]]'' by [[Babak Payami]]
*[[Volpi Cup for Best Actor]]: [[Luigi Lo Cascio]] for ''[[Light of My Eyes]]''
*[[Volpi Cup for Best Actress]]: [[Sandra Ceccarelli]] for ''[[Light of My Eyes]]''
*[[Marcello Mastroianni Award]]: [[Gael García Bernal]] and [[Diego Luna]] for ''[[Y tu mamá también]]''

=== ''Luigi De Laurentis'' Award for Debut Feature ===
*''[[Bread and Milk]]'' for [[Jan Cvitkovic]] and Danijel Hocevar

== Independent Awards ==

=== Cinema of the Present - Lion of the Year ===
*''[[Seafood (film)|Seafood]]'' by Zhu Wen 
*'''Special Jury Award''': ''Le Souffle'' by Damien Odoul

=== FIPRESCI Prize ===
*'''Competition''': ''[[Wild Innocence]]'' by [[Philippe Garrel]]
*'''Parallel Sections''': ''Le Souffle'' by Damien Odoul

=== OCIC Award ===
*''[[Secret Ballot (film)|Secret Ballot]]'' by [[Babak Payami]]

=== Netpac Award ===
*''[[Secret Ballot (film)|Secret Ballot]]'' by [[Babak Payami]]
*''[[Quitting]]'' by [[Zhang Yang (director)|Yang Zhang]]

=== Don Quixote Award ===
*''[[Time Out (2001 film)|L'emploi du temps]]'' by [[Laurent Cantet]]

=== UNICEF Award ===
*''[[Secret Ballot (film)|Secret Ballot]]'' by [[Babak Payami]]

=== UNESCO Award ===
*''[[Porto of My Childhood]]'' by [[Manoel de Oliveira]]

=== Pasinetti Award ===
*'''Best Film''': ''[[Secret Ballot (film)|Secret Ballot]]'' by [[Babak Payami]]
*'''Best Actor''': [[Luigi Lo Cascio]] for ''[[Light of My Eyes]]''
*'''Best Actress''': [[Sandra Ceccarelli]] for ''[[Light of My Eyes]]''

=== Italian Cinema Clubs Awards ===
*''[[Sailing Home (film)|Sailing Home]]'' for [[Vincenzo Marra]]

=== Pietro Bianchi Award ===
*[[Alberto Sordi]]

=== Isvema Award ===
*''[[Sailing Home (film)|Sailing Home]]''  by [[Vincenzo Marra]]

=== FEDIC Award ===
*''[[Sailing Home (film)|Sailing Home]]'' by [[Vincenzo Marra]]

=== Wella Prize ===
*''[[Red Moon (2001 film)|Red Moon]]'' by [[Licia Maglietta]]

=== Elvira Notari Prize ===
*''[[Fish and Elephant]]'' by [[Li Yu (director)|Yu Li]]

=== Cult Network Italia Prize ===
*''[[Sailing Home (film)|Sailing Home]]'' by [[Vincenzo Marra]]

=== FilmCritica "Bastone Bianco" Award ===
*''[[Dias de Nietzsche em Turim]]'' by [[Júlio Bressane]]

=== Future Film Festival Digital Award ===
*''[[A.I. Artificial Intelligence]]'' by [[Steven Spielberg]]

=== Laterna Magica Prize ===
*''[[Monsoon Wedding]]'' by [[Mira Nair]]

=== Sergio Trasatti Award ===
*''[[Light of My Eyes]]'' by [[Giuseppe Piccioni]]

=== CinemAvvenire Award ===
*'''Best Film on the Relationship Man-Nature''': ''[[Sailing Home (film)|Sailing Home]]'' by [[Vincenzo Marra]]
*'''Best Film''': ''[[Waking Life]]'' by [[Richard Linklater]]
*'''Best First Film''': ''[[Ggot seom]]'' by [[Il-gon Song]]

=== Children and Cinema Award ===
*''[[The Navigators (film)|The Navigators]]'' by [[Ken Loach]]

=== Rota Soundtrack Award ===
*[[George Fenton]] for ''[[The Navigators (film)|The Navigators]]''

=== Mimmo Rotella Foundation Award ===
*''Quem És Tu?'' by [[João Botelho]]
**'''Special Director's Award''': [[Babak Payami]]
